name: E2E Playwright Testing
description: End-to-end testing with Playwright for web applications. Covers locator strategies, authentication reuse, form testing, assertions, test organization, and debugging. Triggers on tasks involving E2E tests, browser testing, Playwright, form submission testing, or user flow testing.
keyFeatures: Stack detection (Playwright vs Cypress, React/Inertia/Vue, session vs token auth)
Role-based locator priority (getByRole > getByLabel > getByText > CSS)
Auth storageState reuse via setup project pattern
React date/time input handling with keyboard.type()
Parallelism decision guide (shared DB vs independent tests)
